titleStmt.title: SII 26.326: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 326. (A.R. No. 308 of 1909.) TIRUKKACHCHŪR, CHINGLEPUT TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

p.hi: Tribhº Sundarapāṇḍyadēva I: Year 17, Śiṅga (Āvaṇi) śu. (the tithi lost), Monday, Uttirāḍam = 1268 A.D., August 20. The tithi was śu. 11

summary.p: The beginning of this inscription seems to be built in. It records a gift of a sandhi lamp to the temple of the god Tirukkachchūr occurring in several records above, by the merchant Kāḍuvēṭṭi Nār[pat]teṇṇāyirachchilai ••• •••• veṇvāyiluḍaiyāṉ, resident of the street of Bhuvaṉamuḻupperundern in Śrī-Madhurāntaka-chchatuṟuvēdimaṅgalam. It is stated that he gave 3 cows to provide for this lamp. It is further stated that 1(1/2) cows were accepted by the Śivabrāhmaṇa Mudaliyāṉ Tirunaṭṭa-bhaṭṭaṉ of Bhāradvāja-[gōtra], who had right of worship in the temple and the other 1(1/2) cows by Agattiyaṉ Tiruvālakkōyiluḍaiyāṉ alias Tiruvagatti-bhaṭṭan, who both had agreed to burn the lamp perpetually.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tiruvāykeḻvimuṉṉāka kocaṭapaṉmarāṉa tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīcuntarapāṇṭiyatevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 7 vatu siṅṅanāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu
miyum tiṅkaḷkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Uttirāṭattu nāḷ jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattuk kaḷattūrk koṭṭatuc ceṅkuṉṟa nāṭṭut tirukkaccūr Uṭaiyā
lakkoyiluṭaiya nāyaṉārkku śrīmaturāntakaccatuṟuvetimaṅkalattu puvaṉa muḻutupperunteruvil viyāpāri kāṭuveṭṭi nāṟpatteṇṇāyiraccileya�
veṇvāyiluṭaiyāṉ vaitta canti viḷakku Oṉṟukku viṭṭa pacu muṉṟukku Iṉṉāyaṉāṟkoyil kāṇi Uṭaiya civappirāmaṇaṉ pārattuvāci mutaliyāṉ tirunaṭṭappaṭṭa
koṇṭa pacu Oṉṟaraiyum Akattiyaṉ tiruvālakkoyiluṭaiyāṉāṉa tiruvakattipaṭṭaṉ kaikkoṇṭa pacu Oṉṟaraiyum Āka pacu muṉṟum kaikkoṇṭu
ti viḷakku Oṉṟum cantirātittavarai Erippatākac cilālekai paṇṇikkuṭuttom Ivviruvom Itu śrīmahecurarakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 26.326 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
